decision_object_shape.rationale: string — specific upstream model signal that drove this recommendation
decision_object_shape.tradeoff: string — what is gained / what is sacrificed
trigger_conditions: string — what future change would invalidate this recommendation

service_topology.description: Service decomposition decision: modular monolith vs services vs hybrid. Single decision object.

layering_strategy.description: Layering pattern per bounded context (hexagonal/clean/layered) and CQRS decision per context. Array of decision objects, one per context, each with a 'context' identifier key.

consistency_model.description: Consistency model per aggregate: within_aggregate (always strong) and cross_aggregate_events extracted from the domain model. Array, one entry per aggregate, each with an 'aggregate' identifier key.

storage.description: Storage type per aggregate (relational/document/event-store). Array of decision objects, one per aggregate, each with an 'aggregate' identifier key.

cross_context_query.description: Strategy for consumers that need data spanning multiple bounded contexts: API composition vs dedicated cross-context read model. Single decision object. If no cross-context reads exist in the domain model, set recommendation to 'not_applicable' with rationale.

contract_versioning.description: How context boundaries handle breaking changes to public interfaces (REST APIs and integration events): tolerant reader, consumer-driven contracts, or strict versioning. Single decision object.

integration_patterns.description: Cross-context integration decisions per context map boundary: sync/async, ACL required, messaging style. Array of decision objects, one per boundary, each with a 'boundary' identifier key.

cross_cutting.description: Auth layer placement, error propagation rules per layer boundary, and observability approach. Single decision object.

testing_strategy.description: Testing approach per architectural layer derived from confirmed layering pattern. Array of entries with 'layer', 'what_to_test', and 'what_not_to_test' keys.

nfrs.description: Non-functional requirements. Array of entries with 'constraint', 'target' (numeric value with unit), and 'source' (always human_provided).

risks.description: Identified architectural risks. Array of entries with 'risk', 'impact', 'likelihood', 'mitigation', and 'trigger_signal' keys.

assumptions.description: Assumptions inherited from or implied by the upstream model that are not verified facts. Array of strings.

handoff_contract.description: Binding decisions the tech stack agent can treat as fixed. Array of strings covering topology, patterns, storage types, and integration styles.

open_decisions.description: Unresolved decisions from the session. Array of entries with 'decision' and 'blocked_by' keys.
